name: 🏰Forgotten Realms RPG🐉
description:
hi.. this is up to archiving purposes, so the def is open. i don't intend for anyone to actually use this char on janitor ai, but, do what you want. its up mainly so that you can import it into sillytavern or whatever. found out this bot was deleted when i was looking through my chats and decided to scrape it since i like it :3c

anyways, heres the site archive, it has all the prompts and all the other delicious stuff: Prompt Toolkit

also, here's the soundtrack playlist that i saved long ago:

Forgotten Realms RPG soundtrack - YouTube
creator: hushky
